name: brain-event-bus
description: Brain Event Bus MCP Server - Direct access to Redpanda/Kafka event bus

mcp.name: brain-event-bus
mcp.description: MCP server for brain event bus. Provides direct access to the message broker (Redpanda/Kafka) through abstraction layer. All brain components are peers on the bus.

tools.name: send_llm_request
tools.description: Send request to LLM fallback chain

architecture.description: MCP talks directly to event bus abstraction. JHipster, Python Core, and LLM are all peers on the bus.
architecture.flow: Claude → MCP → EventBus Abstraction → Redpanda/Kafka ← All Services (peers)
